zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Richard ab Einion於1175年出生在英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根布拉萊亞時，他的父親Einion ap Richard27歲，母親Mrs. Einion ap Richard23歲。他與Ellyw verch Rhys Gryg在威爾士格拉莫爾根卡多斯頓 塔 亞斯結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1270年享年95歲，埋葬在威爾士。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Richard ab Einion于1175年出生在英国威尔斯格拉莫爾根布拉萊亞时，他的父亲Einion ap Richard27岁，母亲Mrs. Einion ap Richard23岁。他与Ellyw verch Rhys Gryg在威尔士格拉莫爾根卡多斯頓 塔 亞斯结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1270年享年95岁，埋葬在威尔士。

nameMeanings.name: ab
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch: from a short form of the personal name Adelhard, which is of ancient Germanic origin, composed of the elements adal ‘noble’ + hard ‘bold, hardy’. Compare Ale and Alma 4.

variants.name: Ale
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Carlos Enrique, Cesar, Jose, Maria De Jesus.
Italian (Sicily; Alé): probably a variant of Aleo .

nameMeanings.name: Einion
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Pinning (see Penning ) with -ion substituted for -in(g), perhaps through false association with the word pinion ‘wing, feather’. Compare Pinyan .

variants.name: Penning
meanings: English, Dutch, and North German: from early Middle English penning, Low German penning, Middle Dutch penninc ‘penny’ (see Penny ), a topographic name (from a field name) or a nickname referring to tax dues of a penny.
South German: from the short form, Panno, of an ancient Germanic personal name derived from a word meaning ‘ban, order, command’.
English: from a Middle English personal name Pening, Pining, presumably representing an unrecorded Old English name, a pet form perhaps of Penda or of names like Pendhere and Pendwulf.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Richard ab Einion was born in 1175, in Blaengwrach, Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Einion ap Richard, was 27 and his mother, Mrs. Einion ap Richard, was 23. He married Ellyw verch Rhys Gryg in Cadoxton Juxta Neath, Glamorgan, Wales. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1270, at the age of 95, and was buried in Wales.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Richard ab Einion est né en 1175, à Blaengwrach, Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Einion ap Richard, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Einion ap Richard, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Ellyw verch Rhys Gryg à Cadoxton Juxta Neath, Glamorgan, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1270, à l’âge de 95 ans, et a été enterré à Galles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Richard ab Einion 1175 in Blaengwrach, Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Einion ap Richard 27 und seine Mutter Mrs. Einion ap Richard 23. Er hat in Cadoxton Juxta Neath, Glamorgan, Wales Ellyw verch Rhys Gryg geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1270 im Alter von 95 Jahren und wurde in Wales begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard ab Einion è nato il nel 1175 nel Blaengwrach, Glamorgan, Galles, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Einion ap Richard, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. Einion ap Richard, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Ellyw verch Rhys Gryg nel Cadoxton Juxta Neath, Glamorgan, Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1270, all'età di 95 anni, e fu sepolto a Galles.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Richard ab Einionが1175年にイギリスウェールズグラモーガンブラエングウラチで生まれた時，父Einion ap Richardは27歳，母Mrs. Einion ap Richardは23歳であった。ウェールズグラモーガンカドクストン ジュクスタ ネアスでEllyw verch Rhys Grygと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1270年に95歳で死去し，ウェールズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Richard ab Einion(이)가 1175년 영국 웨일스 글램르건 블라이그라치에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Einion ap Richard(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Einion ap Richard(은)는 23세였다. 그는 웨일스 글램르건 카도스턴 저스타 니앳h에서 Ellyw verch Rhys Gryg(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1270년 95세의 나이로 사망했으며 웨일스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard ab Einion nasceu em 1175, em Blaengwrach, Glamorgan, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Einion ap Richard, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Einion ap Richard, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Ellyw verch Rhys Gryg em Cadoxton Juxta Neath, Glamorgan, Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1270, com 95 anos, e foi sepultado em Gales.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Richard ab Einion родился в 1175 г. в местности блаенгрэич, глэморган, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Einion ap Richard было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Einion ap Richard, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Ellyw verch Rhys Gryg в местности кадокстон джукста нит, глэморган, Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1270 г. в возрасте 95 лет и был похоронен в местности Уэльс.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Richard ab Einion nació en 1175, en Blaengwrach, Glamorgan, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Einion ap Richard, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Mrs. Einion ap Richard, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Ellyw verch Rhys Gryg en Cadoxton Juxta Neath, Glamorgan, Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1270, a la edad de 95 años, y fue sepultado en Gales.
